Clarity.justification: The generated diagram is not clear due to the presence of code and syntax errors instead of a visual representation. It lacks symbols, icons, and a logical layout that would make it understandable to stakeholders.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram is incomplete as it does not include any of the components, connections, or information present in the ground truth diagram. It only contains code snippets and error messages.

Consistency.justification: There is no consistency between the generated diagram and the ground truth. The generated image does not use any of the symbols, styles, or notations from the ground truth diagram, and it is not structurally or semantically aligned.
